pi_items.source: OpenMRS Appointment Scheduling Module REST API documentation and codebase

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating an Appointment Service Type using synthetic data provided directly to the agent in the prompt. The expected name ('Ergonomic Assessment'), duration (45 minutes), and description keyword ('Workplace evaluation') correctly mirror the explicit instructions given to the agent. The target verification REST endpoint ('/appointmentscheduling/appointmenttype') was independently verified against OpenMRS documentation as the correct API endpoint for managing appointment types.
